media-c Directory Reference
Directory dependency graph for media-c:

Files

 buffer.h
 Media buffer type.
 
 capabilities.h
 Capabilities (list of property sets) for media streams.
 
 control.h
 Media control descriptor.
 
 controls.h
 Typed list of control descriptors.
 
 error.h
 Error codes and error information structures for the Media C API.
 
 fraction.h
 Fraction (rational number) type for the Media C API.
 
 list.h
 Generic dynamic array (list) container.
 
 memories.h
 Typed list of memory_t blocks.
 
 memory.h
 Raw memory block descriptor.
 
 properties.h
 Typed list of property_t key-value pairs.
 
 property.h
 Named key-value property type.
 
 spec.h
 Range specification types for control values.
 
 state.h
 Media instance states and state transitions.
 
 stream.h
 Media stream descriptor.
 
 stream_buffer.h
 Named stream buffer.
 
 stream_buffers.h
 Typed list of named stream buffers.
 
 streams.h
 Typed list of stream descriptors.
 
 strings.h
 Typed list of C strings.
 
 value.h
 Tagged variant value system for the Media C API.
 
 version.h
